mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_collect WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_collect WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND collect_time >= CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_collect WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.product_id, c.product_name, COUNT(*) as collect_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_id) as user_count FROM user_collect c WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.product_id, c.product_name ORDER BY collect_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT c.collect_id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.product_name, c.collect_time, u.nick_name FROM user_collect c LEFT JOIN tb_newbee_mall_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0
AND (u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.collect_time >= CURDATE()
AND c.collect_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND c.collect_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY c.collect_time DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_collect c LEFT JOIN tb_newbee_mall_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0
AND (u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.collect_time >= CURDATE()
AND c.collect_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND c.collect_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_collect SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE collect_id = #{collectId} AND is_deleted = 0
